zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Munning於1517年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可內吉時，他的父親Thomas Munning29歲，母親Agnes Barker25歲。他於1542年與Ellen Ungle在英國素福爾可布迪納姆結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1596年8月24日在英國素福爾可內吉享年79歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可內吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Munning于1517年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可內吉时，他的父亲Thomas Munning29岁，母亲Agnes Barker25岁。他于1542年与Ellen Ungle在英国素福爾可布迪納姆结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1596年8月24日在英国素福爾可內吉享年79岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可內吉。

nameMeanings.name: Munning
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English * Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund).

variants.name: Munnings
meanings: English (Suffolk): variant of Munning, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Munning is from the Middle English personal name Munding (Old English Munding, a derivative of names in Mund- or -mund). This form of the surname is the more common one in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

variants.name: Humphry

Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Munning was born in 1517, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Munning, was 29 and his mother, Agnes Barker, was 25. He married Ellen Ungle in 1542, in Brettenham, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 6 daughters. He died about 24 August 1596, in Nedging, Suffolk, England, at the age of 79, and was buried in Nedging, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Munning est né en 1517, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Munning, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes Barker, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Ungle en 1542, à Brettenham, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé environ 24 août 1596, à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 79 ans, et a été enterré à Nedging, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Munning 1517 in Nedging, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Munning 29 und seine Mutter Agnes Barker 25. Er hat 1542 in Brettenham, Suffolk, England Ellen Ungle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb um 24. August 1596 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Nedging, Suffolk, England und wurde in Nedging, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Munning è nato il nel 1517 nel Nedging, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Munning, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Barker, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Ellen Ungle nel 1542, nel Brettenham, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 24 agosto 1596, nel Nedging, Suffolk, England, all'età di 79 anni, e fu sepolto a Nedging, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Munningが1517年にイギリスイギリススフォルクネドジングで生まれた時，父Thomas Munningは29歳，母Agnes Barkerは25歳であった。1542年にイギリススフォルクブレッテンハムでEllen Ungleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は約1596年8月24日にイギリススフォルクネドジングで79歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクネドジングにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Munning(이)가 1517년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 네지잉에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Munning(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Barker(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1542년 영국 수폴크 브레텐함에서 Ellen Ungle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1596년 8월 24일 영국 수폴크 네지잉에서 79세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 네지잉에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Munning nasceu em 1517, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Munning, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Barker, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Ungle em 1542, em Brettenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 24 de agosto de 1596, em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 79 anos, e foi sepultado em Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Munning родился в 1517 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Munning было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Barker, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Ungle в 1542 г. в местности бреттенам, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер около 24 августа 1596 г. в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 79 лет и был похоронен в местности неджинг, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Munning nació en 1517, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Munning, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes Barker, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Ellen Ungle en 1542, en Brettenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 24 de agosto de 1596, en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 79 años, y fue sepultado en Nedging, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
